definition: Comma-Separated Values — a simple file format used to store tabular data, commonly used for data import and export between applications.
extendedDefinition: Comma-Separated Values — a simple file format used to store tabular data, commonly used for data import and export between applications.
description: CSV. Comma-Separated Values — a simple file format used to store tabular data, commonly used for data import and export between applications.
